name: UltraVNC Execution via Command Line
description: Detects UltraVNC execution via the command line with suspicious parameters, indicating potential remote access by adversaries like Gamaredon.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed (e.g., uvnc_sc.exe or vncviewer.exe).

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the UltraVNC executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute UltraVNC, including suspicious parameters.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which UltraVNC was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched UltraVNC.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process.
